extortion.description: INSTYLE is a leading supplier of design-driven, commercial-quality textiles and vinyls for interiors, including office, hospitality, healthcare, public building, transport, public space and high-end residential interiors. Established by Michael Fitzsimons in 1987, INSTYLE is well known today for its stylish, contemporary and sophisticated textile collections, which are designed and developed to high technical standards by its inhouse design studio and produced by leading manufacturers in Australia, New Zealand, USA and Europe. INSTYLE offers an extensive collection: including the benchmark LIFE (Low Impact For the Environment) Textiles® collection and High Performance indoor + outdoor Textiles and Vinyls, which are available across a broad range of price levels for use in upholstery, workstation, screen and wall panelling applications.  Employees: 50 Revenue: $6.6 Million Industry: Manufacturing-Retail Phone Number: +61 293170222
